Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=N,N-dimethylglycine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = glycine betaine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:10072, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:17750, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:58251, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.161; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:17019606}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:10073; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:17019606};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methylation of dimethylglycine to betaine with S-adenosylmethionine (AdoMet) acting as the methyl donor. It has strict specificity for dimethylglycine as the methyl group acceptors. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:17019606}.
